questions.question: Describe the primary difference between a remote procedure call (RPC) and a remote method invocation (RMI) in the context of distributed systems. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the key characteristics of RPC and RMI

questions.question: A request-reply protocol is used in a client-server architecture to facilitate communication between the client and server. What is the primary function of the request-reply protocol in this context? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the request-reply protocol's primary function

questions.question: What is the primary advantage of using remote method invocation (RMI) over traditional RPC in distributed systems? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the benefits of RMI over RPC
